summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open candidate PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. Most items are useful open work but not closeable or mergeable under this job; #88653 is quarantined as security-sensitive; #90799, #87912, #88085, #88180, and #88426 need maintainer or technical judgment before any merge/close path.
